title: Convert fighting game from 2D canvas to 3D (Three.js / React Three Fiber)

requirements.text: Replace the existing 2D canvas-based FightingGame component with a fully 3D scene built using Three.js and React Three Fiber. The scene must include a 3D battle arena (ground plane with visible stage boundaries), 3D character meshes for UG and each Sukuna enemy, dynamic lighting (ambient + directional/point lights for dramatic effect), and a camera that follows the action from a fixed third-person side perspective.

quotes: I want to make it in 3D form

acceptanceCriteria: The game renders inside a React Three Fiber Canvas replacing the old HTML5 canvas element.
UG and Sukuna are represented by distinct 3D meshes (e.g. box or capsule geometries with distinct colors/materials).
A 3D arena floor/stage is visible beneath the characters.
At least one dynamic light source illuminates the scene with noticeable shadow or shading.
Camera is positioned for a side-view perspective and keeps both characters visible.

requirements.text: Port all existing game logic — player movement, jumping, gravity, attack hitboxes, enemy AI, health bar state, combat system, and game status transitions (victory/game-over) — to work with 3D positions (X, Y, Z) in the React Three Fiber scene. Retain keyboard controls and the existing on-screen touch/click control overlay (OnScreenControls) without functional changes.

quotes: I want to make it in 3D form

acceptanceCriteria: UG moves left/right along the X-axis and jumps along the Y-axis; gravity brings UG back to the ground plane.
Punch and kick attacks have 3D hitboxes that correctly detect overlap with Sukuna's bounding volume.
Sukuna AI approaches UG along the X-axis and attacks at close range.
Health bars are still displayed as HTML overlay UI at the top of the screen, updating correctly.
Game-over and victory screens appear when the respective health reaches zero.
Keyboard controls (WASD / arrow keys, Z/X for punch/kick) and on-screen touch buttons all function identically to the 2D version.

requirements.text: Add 3D particle effects for attacks and hits — replace the existing 2D canvas particle system with Three.js particle sprites or instanced meshes. Fiery/cursed-energy visual accents should appear at the point of impact when a hit lands on either character, consistent with the existing bold dramatic theme.

quotes: I want to make it in 3D form

acceptanceCriteria: A burst of 3D particles (instanced meshes or sprite points) appears at the hit location when UG or Sukuna lands an attack.
Particles use fiery orange/red or cursed-energy purple colors matching the existing theme.
Particles fade out or dissipate within ~0.5 seconds after spawning.

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui.
The OnScreenControls component interface (keysRef mutation on press/release) must remain compatible — do not break existing touch control behavior.
All game logic must remain client-side; no backend calls for game state.
nonGoals: Full 3D free-roaming or third-person behind-the-back camera — keep side-view fighting game perspective.
Importing external 3D model files (GLB/FBX); use procedural Three.js geometries.
Changes to the calendar or sanctuary features.
